difficulty.reason: Easy from seed, quick growth, tolerates cool weather, monthly succession

growth_stages.name: Germination
growth_stages.look_for: Thin green spikes like grass poking through the soil

prompt.en: Can you see tiny green needles poking up? Those will become spring onions!
prompt.da: Kan du se bittesmaa groenne naale, der stikker op? De bliver til foraarsloeg!

growth_stages.name: Growth
growth_stages.look_for: Green tubes getting taller and thicker, white base forming

prompt.en: Rub a leaf and smell -- onion! The bugs don't like that smell!
prompt.da: Gnub et blad og lugt -- loeg! Insekterne kan ikke lide den lugt!

growth_stages.name: Harvest
growth_stages.look_for: Pencil-thick stems with white base, about 15-20cm tall

prompt.en: Grab near the bottom and pull up! Rinse and eat it like a stick!
prompt.da: Tag fat taet ved bunden og traek op! Skyl og spis det som en pind!

human_readable.en: Water regularly. Keep soil moist but not waterlogged.
human_readable.da: Vand regelmaessigt. Hold jorden fugtig, men ikke vandfyldt.

harvest.notes: Pull as needed. Succession sow monthly for continuous supply. Allium -- keep away from peas and beans.

companion_plants.notes: Onion scent deters lettuce pests. Alliums inhibit legume nitrogen fixation.

message.en: Spring onions need water to keep growing evenly.
message.da: Foraarsloeg har brug for vand for at vokse jaevnt.
